name: AI billing and subscription index — real-time where possible
next_move: Stand up _ledger/ai_billing.json with one entry per subscription/API account: provider, plan_name, monthly_cost, renewal_date, token_budget (if applicable), token_used_this_period (if fetchable), notes. Build a small poller for providers that expose usage endpoints (Anthropic usage API, OpenAI usage endpoint) — fetch every few hours and write to the ledger. Manual entry where the provider doesn't expose usage. Add a Billing view (Settings tab or its own) showing at-a-glance status: which accounts are healthy, which are close to limits, which are renewing soon.
blockers: API credentials for usage endpoints (read-only scope)
Poll cadence — every few hours is probably right; needs a concrete number
Where Billing view lands in the nav (Settings sub-page vs its own)
live_band: AI spend is real and scattered across providers. Without a single ledger Jake can't see 'am I about to blow through the Anthropic bucket' or 'which subscription renews Thursday.' Weight is lower (0.40) because the day-to-day fidelity cost is low — but visibility matters because a single blown limit can block work for hours.

v1_scope.manual_providers: everything without a public usage endpoint

notes: Declared 2026-04-22 in Jake's scope riff. Comparator hint: spend_visibility.
